name: Bread Pudding with Bourbon Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. With an electric mixer, beat eggs until frothy (about 3 minutes).
2. Add sugar, nutmeg, vanilla and cinnamon, and beat until well blended.
3. Heat butter and milk in a saucepan over medium heat until the butter melts (but do not allow it to boil).
4. In a large bowl, mix together raisins, pecans, and bread cubes.
5. Combine the milk and egg mixtures, pour this over the bread and allow it to soak for 45 minutes.
6. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
7. Lightly grease individual ramekins or a large loaf pan.
8. Add the apple to the bread pudding mixture, and spoon into the baking container.
9. Place in the preheated oven.
10. Reduce heat to 300 degrees F and bake for 40 minutes.
11. Increase heat to 425 degrees F and bake for another 15 minutes until nicely browned.
12. To make bourbon sauce, combine 2 eggs and icing sugar. Melt butter in a double broiler, whisk in egg mixture and cook, stirring constantly, until the sugar has melted and sauce has thickened slightly.
13. Allow to cool, then add bourbon.
14. Serve over bread pudding.
